description: Alpha#1: ArgMax of conditional volatility-squared signal — momentum on volatile names, level on stable names
Alpha#3: Open-volume rank correlation reversal — contrarian on open-vs-volume divergence
Alpha#4: Negative TS-Rank of cross-sectional rank of low — mean-reversion on persistent low names
Alpha#5: Open deviation from 10d VWAP × negative abs of close-vwap spread — institutional flow proxy
Alpha#6: Simple negative open-volume correlation reversal
Alpha#7: Volume-confirmed momentum reversal — fade strong moves on above-avg volume
Alpha#8: Negative rank of 10-day change in (open×returns) 5-day product — exhaustion momentum signal

pattern: if_else(0 < ts_min(ts_delta(close, 1), 5), ts_delta(close, 1), if_else(ts_max(ts_delta(close, 1), 5) < 0, ts_delta(close, 1), -1 * ts_delta(close, 1)))
description: Alpha#9: Persistent-direction momentum — keep sign if monotonic, flip otherwise

pattern: rank(if_else(0 < ts_min(ts_delta(close, 1), 4), ts_delta(close, 1), if_else(ts_max(ts_delta(close, 1), 4) < 0, ts_delta(close, 1), -1 * ts_delta(close, 1))))
description: Alpha#10: Cross-sectional rank of Alpha#9-like momentum-persistence signal
Alpha#11: VWAP-close range rank × volume change rank — confirmation signal
Alpha#12: Volume direction × negative close change — fade moves with volume changes
Alpha#13: Negative rank of close-volume rank covariance — contrarian comoving signal
Alpha#14: Negative returns-change rank × open-volume correlation — composite momentum/flow
Alpha#15: Sum of high-volume rank correlation ranks — fade high-volume continuation
Alpha#16: Negative rank of high-volume rank covariance — contrarian on persistent high+volume
Alpha#17: Triple-rank composite — close ts_rank × close acceleration × relative volume
Alpha#18: Negative rank of intraday range stability + level + close-open correlation

pattern: multiply(-1 * sign(close - ts_delay(close, 7) + ts_delta(close, 7)), 1 + rank(1 + ts_sum(returns, 250)))
description: Alpha#19: Negative sign of 7-day momentum × scaled rank of cumulative returns

pattern: multiply(multiply(-1 * rank(open - ts_delay(high, 1)), rank(open - ts_delay(close, 1))), rank(open - ts_delay(low, 1)))
description: Alpha#20: Gap-up composite rank — open vs prev high/close/low

pattern: if_else(divide(ts_sum(close, 8), 8) + ts_std_dev(close, 8) < divide(ts_sum(close, 2), 2), -1, if_else(divide(ts_sum(close, 2), 2) < divide(ts_sum(close, 8), 8) - ts_std_dev(close, 8), 1, if_else(volume < adv20, -1, 1)))
description: Alpha#21: Trend regime detection — short MA vs long MA ± std, fallback to volume signal
Alpha#22: Negative change in high-volume correlation × close volatility rank
Alpha#23: Negative 2-day high change when high above 20-day average — fade breakouts
Alpha#24: Long-term trend regime — slow trend: distance from min, else short reversal

pattern: rank(multiply(multiply(multiply(-1 * returns, adv20), vwap), high - close))
description: Alpha#25: Composite of negative returns × volume × VWAP × intraday strength
Alpha#26: Negative max correlation between volume rank and high rank — fade strongest comovement
Alpha#27: Binary fade on high volume-VWAP correlation rank
Alpha#28: Volume-low correlation + mid-vs-close spread — institutional support signal
Alpha#29: Deeply nested rank composite + delayed negative returns ts_rank — multi-layer momentum decay

pattern: divide(multiply(1 - rank(sign(close - ts_delay(close, 1)) + sign(ts_delay(close, 1) - ts_delay(close, 2)) + sign(ts_delay(close, 2) - ts_delay(close, 3))), ts_sum(volume, 5)), ts_sum(volume, 20))
description: Alpha#30: Inverse of 3-day momentum-direction confluence × relative volume — fade persistent directional volume

pattern: rank(rank(rank(ts_decay_linear(-1 * rank(rank(ts_delta(close, 10))), 10)))) + rank(-1 * ts_delta(close, 3)) + sign(ts_scale(ts_corr(adv20, low, 12)))
description: Alpha#31: Triple-ranked decay momentum + reversal + scaled volume-low correlation sign
Alpha#32: Scaled close-vs-7d-mean + 20× scaled long-window VWAP-delayed-close correlation
Alpha#33: Negative power of (1 - open/close) — close-vs-open gap signal
Alpha#34: Volatility ratio + reversal rank composite
Alpha#35: Volume rank × inverted range rank × inverted returns rank — contrarian-volume composite

pattern: 2.21 * rank(ts_corr(close - open, ts_delay(volume, 1), 15)) + 0.7 * rank(open - close) + 0.73 * rank(ts_rank(ts_delay(-1 * returns, 6), 5)) + rank(abs(ts_corr(vwap, adv20, 6))) + 0.6 * rank(divide(ts_sum(close, 200), 200) - open * (close - open))
description: Alpha#36: 5-component weighted rank composite — intraday-volume + reversal + delayed-returns + vwap-vol + level
Alpha#37: Long-window intraday-spread-to-close correlation + intraday spread rank
Alpha#38: Negative close ts_rank × close/open ratio rank — fade short-term overperformers
Alpha#39: Negative 7-day momentum × inverted relative-volume decay × cumulative returns rank
Alpha#40: Negative high volatility rank × high-volume correlation
Alpha#41: Geometric mean of high-low minus VWAP — execution-vs-range signal
Alpha#42: Ratio of VWAP-close-spread rank to VWAP-close-sum rank — relative-execution signal
Alpha#43: Relative volume ts_rank × negative 7-day momentum ts_rank — volume-confirmed reversal
Alpha#44: Negative correlation of high with rank-volume — fade high+volume coupling
Alpha#45: Negative compound of delayed-close trend rank × close-volume corr × cross-window close-sum corr

pattern: if_else(0.25 < (divide(ts_delay(close, 20) - ts_delay(close, 10), 10) - divide(ts_delay(close, 10) - close, 10)), -1, if_else((divide(ts_delay(close, 20) - ts_delay(close, 10), 10) - divide(ts_delay(close, 10) - close, 10)) < 0, 1, -1 * ts_delta(close, 1)))
description: Alpha#46: Acceleration regime detector — fade if recent strongly outpaces older, else short-reversal

pattern: multiply(divide(rank(divide(1, close)) * volume, adv20), divide(high * rank(high - close), divide(ts_sum(high, 5), 5))) - rank(vwap - ts_delay(vwap, 5))
description: Alpha#47: Inverse-price + intraday-range volume composite minus VWAP momentum

pattern: group_neutralize(divide(multiply(ts_corr(ts_delta(close, 1), ts_delta(ts_delay(close, 1), 1), 250), ts_delta(close, 1)), close), subindustry) / ts_sum(power(divide(ts_delta(close, 1), ts_delay(close, 1)), 2), 250)
description: Alpha#48: Subindustry-neutralized close-delta correlation signal divided by 250-day returns volatility — long-window mean-reversion
Alpha#49: Decel regime detector — go long if recent move underpace older, else short reversal
Alpha#50: Negative max of rank-volume vs rank-VWAP correlation rank — fade strongest comovement
Alpha#51: Similar to Alpha#49 with -0.05 threshold — slower deceleration signal

pattern: multiply(multiply(-1 * ts_delta(ts_min(low, 5), 5) + rank(divide(ts_sum(returns, 240) - ts_sum(returns, 20), 220)), ts_rank(volume, 5)), -1 * ts_min(low, 5))
description: Alpha#52: Composite of low-min change + long-vs-short returns spread × volume × low-min
Alpha#53: Negative 9-day change in normalized close position within range
Alpha#54: Ratio of low-close to low-high gap raised to 5th-power scaling — convex execution signal
Alpha#55: Negative correlation between Stochastic K rank and volume rank — fade stochastic-volume coupling
Alpha#56: Negative compound of returns-ratio rank × returns-cap rank — large-cap-weighted reversal
Alpha#57: Negative close-VWAP spread normalized by decay of ArgMax rank — execution+momentum-decay signal
Alpha#58: Negative decay-ranked correlation between sector-neutralized VWAP and volume
Alpha#59: Industry-neutralized VWAP-volume correlation, decay-ranked — similar to #58 with industry grouping

pattern: 0 - 1 * (2 * ts_scale(rank(divide((close - low) - (high - close), high - low) * volume)) - ts_scale(rank(ts_argmax(close, 10))))
description: Alpha#60: Money-flow weighted volume scale minus argmax close scale — momentum vs flow contrast
Alpha#61: Binary signal — VWAP-near-min rank vs VWAP-vol correlation rank

pattern: if_else(rank(ts_corr(vwap, ts_sum(adv20, 22), 10)) < rank(2 * rank(open) - rank(divide(high + low, 2) + high)), -1, 0) * -1
description: Alpha#62: Conditional fade based on VWAP-volume corr rank vs open-vs-mid rank
Alpha#63: Conditional fade based on industry-neut close-delta decay vs vwap-vol corr decay
Alpha#64: Conditional fade based on weighted open-low corr vs mid-vwap delta

pattern: if_else(rank(ts_corr(0.00817205 * open + (1 - 0.00817205) * vwap, ts_sum(adv60, 8), 6)) < rank(open - ts_min(open, 13)), -1, 0) * -1
description: Alpha#65: Conditional fade — open-near-vwap corr rank vs open-near-min rank

pattern: -1 * (rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(vwap, 3), 7)) + ts_rank(ts_decay_linear(divide((low * 0.96633 + low * (1 - 0.96633) - vwap), open - divide(high + low, 2)), 11), 6))
description: Alpha#66: Negative composite of VWAP-delta decay + low-vwap-execution decay ts_rank

pattern: power(rank(high - ts_min(high, 2)), rank(ts_corr(group_neutralize(vwap, sector), group_neutralize(adv20, subindustry), 6))) * -1
description: Alpha#67: Negative power of high-near-min rank ^ sector-neut vwap-vol corr rank
Alpha#68: Conditional fade — high-vol corr rank vs weighted close-low delta rank
Alpha#69: Negative power of industry-neut vwap-delta max rank ^ close-vwap-vol corr ts_rank
Alpha#70: Negative power of vwap-delta rank ^ industry-neut close-vol corr ts_rank
Alpha#71: Max of two ts_decay_linear ts_rank composites — close-vol corr vs low-open-vwap power
Alpha#72: Ratio of two ts_decay_linear corr rank composites — mid-vol vs vwap-vol

pattern: max(rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_delta(vwap, 5), 3)), ts_rank(ts_decay_linear(divide(-1 * ts_delta(0.147155 * open + (1 - 0.147155) * low, 2), 0.147155 * open + (1 - 0.147155) * low), 17), 17)) * -1
description: Alpha#73: Negative max of vwap-delta decay rank vs weighted open-low-relative-delta decay ts_rank

pattern: if_else(rank(ts_corr(close, ts_sum(adv30, 37), 15)) < rank(ts_corr(rank(0.0261661 * high + (1 - 0.0261661) * vwap), rank(volume), 11)), -1, 0) * -1
description: Alpha#74: Conditional fade — close-vol corr rank vs weighted high-vwap volume corr rank
Alpha#75: Binary signal — vwap-vol corr rank vs low-vol rank corr rank
Alpha#76: Negative max of vwap-delta decay rank vs sector-neut low-vol corr ts_rank decay ts_rank

pattern: min(rank(ts_decay_linear(divide(high + low, 2) + high - (vwap + high), 20)), rank(ts_decay_linear(ts_corr(divide(high + low, 2), adv40, 3), 6)))
description: Alpha#77: Min of two decay rank composites — mid-high spread vs mid-vol corr

pattern: power(rank(ts_corr(ts_sum(0.352233 * low + (1 - 0.352233) * vwap, 20), ts_sum(adv40, 20), 7)), rank(ts_corr(rank(vwap), rank(volume), 6)))
description: Alpha#78: Power of two corr rank composites — weighted low-vwap-vol vs vwap-vol

pattern: if_else(rank(ts_delta(group_neutralize(0.60733 * close + (1 - 0.60733) * open, sector), 1)) < rank(ts_corr(ts_rank(vwap, 4), ts_rank(0.60733 * adv150 + (1 - 0.60733) * adv150, 9), 15)), 1, 0)
description: Alpha#79: Binary signal — sector-neut weighted close-open delta rank vs vwap-vol corr rank
Alpha#80: Negative power of industry-neut open-high delta sign rank ^ high-vol corr ts_rank
Alpha#81: Conditional fade — log-product of vwap-vol corr rank power vs vwap-vol corr rank
Alpha#82: Negative min of open-delta decay rank vs vol-open corr decay ts_rank

pattern: divide(rank(ts_delay(divide(high - low, divide(ts_sum(close, 5), 5)), 2)) * rank(rank(volume)), divide(divide(high - low, divide(ts_sum(close, 5), 5)), vwap - close))
description: Alpha#83: Ratio of delayed-range rank × vol rank to range-vs-execution gap
Alpha#84: Signed power of vwap-near-max ts_rank ^ close-delta — momentum-confirmed exec signal

pattern: power(rank(ts_corr(0.876703 * high + (1 - 0.876703) * close, adv30, 9)), rank(ts_corr(ts_rank(divide(high + low, 2), 3), ts_rank(volume, 10), 7)))
description: Alpha#85: Power of weighted high-close-vol corr rank ^ mid-vol corr rank
Alpha#86: Conditional fade — close-vol corr ts_rank vs open-close-vwap composite rank
Alpha#87: Negative max of close-vwap delta decay rank vs industry-neut vol-close abs corr ts_rank
Alpha#88: Min of open-low vs high-close rank composite decay vs close-vol corr decay ts_rank
Alpha#89: Low-vol corr decay ts_rank minus industry-neut vwap-delta decay ts_rank
Alpha#90: Negative power of close-near-max rank ^ subindustry-neut vol-low corr ts_rank
Alpha#91: Negative composite of industry-neut close-vol corr nested decay ts_rank minus vwap-vol corr decay rank
Alpha#92: Min of intraday range-vs-low-open binary decay ts_rank vs low-vol rank corr decay ts_rank
Alpha#93: Ratio of industry-neut vwap-vol corr decay ts_rank to weighted close-vwap delta decay rank
Alpha#94: Negative power of vwap-near-min rank ^ vwap-vol corr ts_rank
Alpha#95: Binary signal — open-near-min rank vs mid-vol corr rank power ts_rank
Alpha#96: Negative max of vwap-vol corr rank decay ts_rank vs close-vol corr argmax decay ts_rank
Alpha#97: Negative composite of industry-neut low-vwap delta decay rank minus low-vol corr nested ts_rank decay ts_rank
Alpha#98: VWAP-vol corr decay rank minus open-vol corr argmin ts_rank decay rank
Alpha#99: Conditional fade — mid-vol corr rank vs low-vol corr rank

pattern: 0 - 1 * (1.5 * ts_scale(group_neutralize(group_neutralize(rank(divide((close - low) - (high - close), high - low) * volume), subindustry), subindustry)) - ts_scale(group_neutralize(ts_corr(close, rank(adv20), 5) - rank(ts_argmin(close, 30)), subindustry)))
description: Alpha#100: Negative weighted scale of subindustry-neut money-flow-volume rank minus subindustry-neut close-vol corr — argmin
Alpha#101: Simple intraday-return-to-range ratio — normalized momentum
